title: Quran, Sura 110: An-Nasr
description: Sura 110 (An-Nasr: Divine Support) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 110 (An-Nasr: Divine Support) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: When the victory of God has come and the conquest, and you see the people entering into the religion of God in multitudes, then exalt Him with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him.
